form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 49-day let-up. Last start made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track on February 21 over 1400m, 0.1 len behind Lazfatih with 51kg at $6.15. Before that ran on from midfield and won by 0.7 len at this track January 31 over 1500m defeating Azapkapi with 50.5kg at $8.95. Doesn?t need to improve much to salute.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of eight months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second last of 11 at this track August 8 over 2000m, 43 len behind Das Fatih carrying 52.5kg at $13.15. When resuming last campaign ran last of 8 at Osmangazi June 23 over 2400m, 12 len behind Argali with 56kg at $39.05. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.
